Module com.examplez.demo

Package com.examplez.demo.Model

package com.examplez.demo.Model
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    com.examplez.demo
     
    com.examplez.demo.Controller
     
  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    Card
    Immutable-in-practice representation of one card used by the game model.
    Desk
    Represents the draw deck from which players receive replacement cards.
    DiscardPile
    Stores the ordered collection of cards that have already been played.
    Game
    Central model for the turn-based card game.
    Player
    Base representation of a participant in the card game.
    PlayerHuman
    Human-controlled specialization of Player.
    PlayerMachine
    Automatically controlled specialization of Player.
